headline: Why Adobe Stock Is Rising on Thursday
summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ: ADBE) stock traded higher Thursday after HSBC upgraded the stock to Buy and a weak June jobs report shifted federal interest rate expectations.

headline: Michael Burry Hints His AI Bear Thesis Extends Beyond Tesla, Nvidia Shorts: 'There Is So Much More to This'
summary: Michael Burry hinted his AI bear thesis goes beyond recent shorts in Tesla, Nvidia and other companies disclosed earlier this week.

headline: Okta, Autodesk, and Dynatrace Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after Guggenheim's John DiFucci upgraded both Salesforce and ServiceNow to Buy, arguing the AI-disruption fear that gutted the software sector during the year had pushed valuations too low.
